label: Prepatellar bursitis without septic-joint or trauma red flags
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated prepatellar bursitis.

No septic joint concern, cellulitis, open wound, fracture/dislocation concern, neurovascular compromise, inability to bear weight, high-energy trauma, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Septic joint or infection concern, cellulitis, open wound, fracture/dislocation concern, neurovascular compromise, inability to bear weight, severe or rapidly worsening pain, high-energy trauma, immunocompromised host, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed orthopedic plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, sports medicine, orthopedics, therapy, urgent care, or the ED if symptoms are not improving or your clinician told you to recheck.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports bursitis framing, rest/activity modification, clinician-directed pain control, and escalation for infection, severe pain, or functional worsening. This expansion is limited to clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated prepatellar bursitis with septic joint, infection, wound, trauma, fracture/dislocation, neurovascular, pregnancy/pediatric, and specialist-directed pathways absent.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports bursitis framing, rest/activity modification, clinician-directed pain control, and escalation for infection, severe pain, or functional worsening. This expansion is limited to clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated prepatellar bursitis with septic joint, infection, wound, trauma, fracture/dislocation, neurovascular, pregnancy/pediatric, and specialist-directed pathways absent.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis of uncomplicated prepatellar bursitis
no septic joint, cellulitis, or open wound
no fracture/dislocation concern or high-energy trauma
